description_long: This is a modern computer desk with a glossy black finish and vibrant green accents. The desk features a large flat work surface supporting a widescreen monitor, a full-sized keyboard, and a mouse. On the right side, there is a set of three green drawers with metallic handles, providing storage space. Above the drawers, a matching green and black desktop organizer with two shelves is present, suitable for holding documents or small items. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a sturdy rectangular structure. The desk appears to be constructed primarily from wood or engineered wood with a high-gloss laminate, complemented by plastic or metal hardware.
description: A sleek black and green computer desk with drawers, a monitor, keyboard, mouse, and a desktop organizer. The design is modern and functional, ideal for a tech-focused workspace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the monitor, keyboard, mouse, three green drawers, and a green-black desktop organizer.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the stacked organizer and monitor.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the monitor and the solid back panel of the desk.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the keyboard, mouse, and the open surface area, as well as the organizer's shelves.
attribute_location: gaming room or modern home office
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features the drawers and desktop organizer on the right, with the monitor, keyboard, and mouse positioned centrally for ergonomic access.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation for gaming or office productivity
